title: Russian Application Header — Ready-Made Templates for Different Situations
excerpt: The application header in Russian documents: what goes into it, how to arrange "Кому", "От кого" and the date, and ready templates for employers, government bodies, and managers.
content:
# Russian Application Header — Ready-Made Templates for Different Situations

[Open the Addressee Generator →](/en/generator-adresata)

The header of a Russian official application consists of the recipient line ("Кому"), the sender line ("От кого"), and the date. A correctly formatted header sets the right tone for the entire document. Here is a complete guide with ready templates.

## What Goes into the Header

A standard Russian application header contains:

1. **"Кому"** — the recipient: position, organization, full name (dative case)
2. **"От кого"** — the sender: full name, sometimes position and organization (genitive case)
3. **Date** — day, month, and year (usually right-aligned or centered)

There is typically an empty line between "Кому" and "От кого". The date may be right-aligned, centered, or placed below the "От кого" line.

## Key Rule: Grammatical Cases

- "Кому" — **dative case** (to whom?)
- "От кого" — **genitive case** (from whom?)

This is the most common source of errors. Quick check: "I am writing to the CEO" (dative) vs "the letter of the CEO" (genitive).

## Template: Application to Employer (resignation, vacation, sick leave)

```
Генеральному директору ООО «СтройМир»
Соколову А.П.

От менеджера проектов
ООО «СтройМир»
Фёдоровой Елены Сергеевны

                                          15 May 2026
```

## Template: Application to Government Body (complaint, inquiry)

```
Начальнику Управления Федеральной налоговой службы
по г. Москве
Красникову Дмитрию Владимировичу

От главного бухгалтера
ООО «АудитПлюс»
Мироновой Ольги Николаевны

                                          20 May 2026
```

## Template: Application to Department Head

```
Директору по кадрам
ООО «Логистика»
Волкову Игорю Константиновичу

От специалиста отдела логистики
ООО «Логистика»
Лебедевой Анны Андреевны

                                          10 May 2026
```

## Template: To an Individual Entrepreneur

```
Индивидуальному предпринимателю
Павлову Сергею Александровичу

От ООО «Сервис»
Директора
Морозова Алексея Дмитриевича

                                          18 May 2026
```

## Where to Place the Salutation

The salutation ("Уважаемый...", "Уважаемая...") is **not** part of the header. It is written on a separate line, after the date and before the main text of the application:

```
                                          15 May 2026

Уважаемый Александр Петрович!

Прошу предоставить мне ежегодный оплачиваемый отпуск...
```

If the recipient's full name is unknown, use a neutral form: "Уважаемый господин директор!" or "Уважаемая Елена!"

## How to Download a Template in DOCX

After generating the "Кому" and "От кого" blocks in the Addressee Generator, you can download a complete application template in DOCX format. The document will contain:
- Header with correctly cased lines
- Salutation line
- Application body template
- Space for signature and date

[Download application template in DOCX →](/en/generator-adresata)

The DOCX format is convenient because you can edit it in Word before printing — adjust the wording, add your specific request.

## What to Check Before Printing

- Does the position and organization name match your founding documents exactly?
- Are all words correctly declined (check in a dictionary if unsure)?
- Is the date in the correct position?
- Is there an empty line between the header and the body?

## Common Header Mistakes

- **Wrong case**: "От генерального директора" in the "Кому" line — this is incorrect
- **Incomplete name**: "ООО Ромашка" instead of "ООО «Ромашка»"
- **Wrong capitalization**: "Генеральному Директору" — only the first word is capitalized
- **Missing empty line** between "Кому" and "От кого"
- **Wrong order**: surname before position, instead of position first

## FAQ

### Does the date go before or after "От кого"?
In most formats, the date is right-aligned, level with or below the "От кого" line. In some official document forms, the date appears in the upper left corner.

### Is an empty line required between "Кому" and "От кого"?
Yes, this is the standard formatting. Without it, the document looks cramped.

### Is the date mandatory?
Yes. The date shows when the application was written. This is important for meeting deadlines.

### Is the salutation mandatory?
For applications to an employer or government body — yes. For private correspondence — depends on context.
